summary: Best onboarding comes from compact context plus handshake; freshness and trust semantics degrade when not restated explicitly.
onboarding_mode: Use context.compact.json plus a short handshake
Use profile.core.md directly for repo-local work when compact export is unnecessary
degradation_patterns: Freshness and trust semantics become passive unless surfaced explicitly
Long-form profile nuance compresses into generalized behavior
Project memory or instructions can drift from repo source of truth

basis: Observed workflow assumptions captured in docs
scope_limits: No dedicated vendor-specific field study yet
